text: A bus rides down an empty residential street.
A view looking out from the inside of a car window at an intersection, with a truck and a car at the opposite side of the street.
A scene displays a vast array of flower pots in front of a decorated building.
a person jumpin high over a snow cliff with a snow board
A train is stopped at a train station.

A man and a woman getting married in front of a priest.
